title: Analysis Continuity Update: FA4 B200 White-Box Predictor
summary: Reusable conclusions from the analysis stage of the FA4 B200 empirical pass. The combined white-box predictor is supported and the empirical pass is finalized.

reusable_conclusions: The combined predictor (occupancy + effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth + precision-specific MMA/MUFU throughput) is supported on the held-out validation set.
TMA/L2 effective-bandwidth modeling is the dominant source of improvement; occupancy and precision terms provide a smaller but measurable further reduction in MAPE and max APE.
All success criteria are met: MAPE 4.50%, 100% within 30% error, 100% bottleneck-label accuracy, +17.7pp vs baseline.
The largest residual errors occur on TMA-limited and small-HBM configurations; the model still stays within the 30% envelope.
The empirical pass is emulator-validated only; real B200 silicon measurements would be the strongest next validation.
open_follow_ups: Transfer-validation on real B200 kernel launches when feasible.
Sensitivity to custom tile sizes, num_splits, and fused variants outside the synthetic matrix.
